notes: Based on 6 current live whole-unit residential rental listings in/around Buloh Kasap that were explicitly tied to Buloh Kasap/Taman Yayasan/Billion/SMK Buloh Kasap and excluded room-only/bedspace/partition rentals. The usable current band is RM900-RM1,500/month. One Mudah Taman Tasik Sejati listing had a header price of RM1,300 but description text mentioning RM1,500; I used the header price. Because Buloh Kasap-specific inventory is thin, a couple of the listings are in nearby Segamat neighborhoods that are explicitly linked to the Buloh Kasap area.
